h1: Israel Researcher — Automated TASE Equity Research System
p: Israel Researcher is an AI-powered stock research agent that scans the full Tel Aviv Stock Exchange (TASE) every 15 minutes. It reads regulatory filings, monitors news, detects market anomalies, and uses GPT to rank investment opportunities — then broadcasts results via Telegram. It covers every Israeli stock: TA-35, TA-125, TA-SME, and new IPOs from day one.

ac:rich-text-body.p: Create a .env file in the project root with your credentials, then run python -m israel_researcher. That's it.

p: Every 15 minutes, the system runs a full research cycle:

ol.li: Reads the latest corporate filings from Maya (the official TASE disclosure system) — earnings, IPOs, contracts, institutional moves, buybacks, M&A — before any financial media picks them up.
Scans Israeli news RSS feeds (Globes, Calcalist, Ynet, Walla, Maariv) and matches articles to company names in Hebrew.
Detects market anomalies across ~500 TASE stocks via yfinance: volume spikes, price breaks, RSI bounces, 52-week highs/lows, momentum streaks.
Runs 7 sector-specialized AI agents in parallel — each one an expert on its domain.
A CIO-level manager LLM reads all sector outputs and picks the best cross-sector opportunity of the week.
Sends a Telegram alert with top 3 stocks, scores, and catalysts. Also answers free-text questions 24/7.

p: Standard Israeli stock screeners have three blind spots this system was designed to fix:

tr.td: Only TA-35 coverage — most tools ignore the 400+ smaller TASE stocks where real alpha lives.
DiscoveryAgent covers the full TASE universe including TA-SME and new IPOs from day one of their listing.
Late to the news — by the time financial media reports a Maya filing, the stock has already moved.
Maya filings are read in real time via Playwright. The system often scores a stock before the first news article is published.
No Israeli macro context — generic screeners don't know that a ceasefire is bad for defense stocks, or that shekel depreciation helps tech exporters.
Every LLM call receives an explicit Israeli macro framework: geopolitics, BoI rates, shekel moves, oil prices, US-Israel relations.

p: The diagram below shows all major components and data flows in one view.

ac:structured-macro.ac:plain-text-body:
@startuml skinparam backgroundColor #FAFAFA skinparam componentStyle rectangle skinparam defaultFontName Arial skinparam defaultFontSize 12
title Israel Researcher — Full System Architecture
package "Data Sources (Phase 1 — Sequential)" { [Maya API
(Playwright)] as MAYA [Market Data
(yfinance)] as MKT [Israeli News RSS
(Globes, Ynet, Walla)] as NEWS [Google News RSS
(per ticker)] as GNEWS [Global Headlines
(Yahoo/WSJ/MarketWatch)] as GLOB }
package "Analysis Engine" { [SignalEnricher] as ENRICH [ConvergenceEngine
(scoring + multipliers)] as CONV [StockMemoryManager
(analyst notebook)] as MEM }
package "Sector Agents (Phase 2 — Parallel × 4)" { [BanksAgent
15 tickers] as BANKS [TechDefenseAgent
11 tickers] as TECH [EnergyAgent
9 tickers] as ENERGY [PharmaAgent
7 tickers] as PHARMA [RealEstateAgent
15 tickers] as REALE [TelecomConsumerAgent
8 tickers] as TELCO [DiscoveryAgent
~500 tickers] as DISC }
package "LLM Layer (GPT-4o-mini)" { [LLMAnalyst
(sector scoring)] as LLM [ResearchManager
(CIO arbitration)] as MGR [QAPipeline
(free-text Q&A)] as QA }
package "Output" { [TelegramReporter
(quick alerts / weekly)] as TEL [Excel Memory
(israel_researcher_memory.xlsx)] as XLS [State File
(israel_researcher_state.json)] as STATE }
package "Telegram Bot (Daemon Thread)" { [BotServer
(long-poll)] as BOT [CommandHandler
(14 slash commands)] as CMD [QAPipeline] as QA2 }
MAYA --> ENRICH : filings (TASE{id} signals) MKT --> BANKS : anomaly signals (.TA) MKT --> TECH MKT --> ENERGY MKT --> PHARMA MKT --> REALE MKT --> TELCO MKT --> DISC NEWS --> ENRICH : article signals GNEWS --> LLM : web news per ticker GLOB --> LLM : macro context (text) ENRICH --> CONV CONV --> BANKS CONV --> TECH CONV --> ENERGY CONV --> PHARMA CONV --> REALE CONV --> TELCO CONV --> DISC MEM --> LLM : memory context BANKS --> LLM TECH --> LLM ENERGY --> LLM PHARMA --> LLM REALE --> LLM TELCO --> LLM DISC --> LLM LLM --> MGR : ranked sector portfolios MGR --> TEL : Stock of the Week + top 3 MGR --> XLS : picks + alert history MGR --> STATE : signal history MEM --> XLS : stock memory backup BOT --> CMD BOT --> QA2 QA2 --> MEM : memory lookup QA2 --> MKT : live scan QA2 --> GNEWS : news search TEL --> Telegram @enduml

tr.td: MayaMonitor reads the latest 100 filings via POST to Maya REST API, wrapped in a Playwright browser session (required to bypass Incapsula WAF). MayaFilingExtractor fetches full text for high-value filings (max 2/cycle). EarningsCalendar reads the financial-reports schedule endpoint.

MarketAnomalyDetector runs 8 technical detectors on every ticker. MacroContext fetches 7 macro instruments. DualListedMonitor checks 13 Nasdaq/NYSE dual-listed stocks overnight. SectorAnalyzer computes per-sector RSI and 1-month return. DynamicUniverseBuilder fetches the full TLV-exchange ticker list from Yahoo Finance Screener.

IsraeliNewsMonitor reads 8 RSS feeds (Globes Finance, Globes Stocks, Calcalist, Ynet Finance, Ynet Business, Walla Finance, Walla News, Maariv Business). Matches article text to Hebrew company names from Maya's autocomplete cache using regex word-boundary matching.

WebNewsSearcher hits Google News RSS with two queries per ticker (company name + ticker symbol). LLM (extract_web_news_signals) parses results into typed Signal objects. No API key needed. Throttled at 0.3s between queries.
Chrome-driven news fetcher — in progress, not yet integrated into main pipeline.

ConvergenceEngine.group_by_ticker() aggregates all signals per ticker, sums base scores, applies pairwise multipliers, adds earnings proximity gradient, and applies the 3-category convergence bonus. Returns a ranked list of {ticker, final_score, signals, multiplier_applied}.

SignalEnricher upgrades GENERAL signals (produced when Hebrew name matching fails) by scanning the article text for keywords from KEYWORD_GROUPS in config.py. A GENERAL signal about "חוזה" becomes a new_contract signal.

LLMAnalyst wraps all GPT-4o-mini calls. score_sector() scores a full sector portfolio. arbitrate() runs the CIO manager prompt. extract_web_news_signals() converts raw articles to structured signals. resolve_ticker() maps Hebrew company names to .TA symbols (bot use).

StockMemoryManager maintains a dict of per-stock memory in state. build_context_string() formats it for LLM injection. update_llm_insights() writes back GPT's memory_update fields after each sector call.
Writes israel_researcher_memory.xlsx with 3 sheets after every cycle. Sheet 1 (Active Stock Memory) is the recovery mechanism — it can restore stock_memory and alerted_today after a state wipe.
SectorAgent abstract base class. Defines the 9-step run() flow. Subclasses override _get_sector_macro_signals() and optionally _filter_signals() (DiscoveryAgent).
BanksAgent — 15 tickers: Big-5 banks + Bank of Jerusalem, 5 insurance groups, Isracard, Israel Corp, Discount Investment, TASE Ltd. Macro: KBE/XLF ETF move, IL10Y proxy.
TechDefenseAgent — 11 tickers: Elbit, NextVision, Hilan, Formula, Malam-Team, Nova, Tower Semi, Camtek, NICE, AudioCodes, Allot, Matrix IT. Macro: LMT/RTX peers, AMAT/KLAC semis, VIX, shekel move.
EnergyAgent — 9 tickers: Delek Group, OPC Energy, Enlight, Navitas, NewMed, Energix, Oil Refineries (Bazan), Paz, Ratio. Macro: WTI (CL=F), NG=F, Brent (BZ=F), NEE.
PharmaAgent — 7 tickers: Teva, ICL, Kamada, Compugen, Evogene, Brainsway, Blue & White Pharma. Macro: XBI, IBB, MOS (potash proxy for ICL).

RealEstateAgent — 15 tickers: Azrieli, Amot, BIG, Melisron, Mivne, Dimri, Shapir, Alony-Hetz, Gav-Yam, Airport City, G City, Shikun & Binui, Aura, Rotshtein, Africa Israel Residences. Macro: VNQ/IYR REITs, shekel.
TelecomConsumerAgent — 8 tickers: Bezeq, Partner, Cellcom, Shufersal, Strauss, Fattal, Rami Levi, Elco. Macro: XLP/IYZ ETFs, shekel (importers).

DiscoveryAgent — full TASE universe (~500 tickers) NOT covered by the 6 sector agents. Overrides _filter_signals() to pass through maya_ipo and maya_spinoff signals even without a real ticker. Uses DynamicUniverseBuilder (YF Screener) as universe source.

BotServer runs as a daemon thread. Long-polls Telegram (getUpdates timeout=30s). Routes "/" messages to CommandHandler and free text to QAPipeline. Maintains per-chat conversation history (last 8 messages). Persists last_offset to bot_state.json after every batch to prevent re-processing on restart.
Handles 14 slash commands. Settings commands mutate BotSettings and atomically save to bot_state.json. Status commands read live state without blocking.

QAPipeline.answer() runs 3 sequential LLM calls: intent detection → tool execution → answer generation. 10-second per-chat cooldown. Sends "Analyzing..." placeholder immediately. Hebrew ticker resolution via resolve_ticker() when needed.
Stores user-defined price/event alert subscriptions. Not yet wired into main pipeline — planned feature.

All credentials and thresholds. Auto-loads .env file via python-dotenv on import. Defines KEYWORD_GROUPS (40+ terms per signal type in Hebrew + English), SECTOR_TICKERS, TASE_MAJOR_TICKERS, DUAL_LISTED_STOCKS, MACRO_TICKERS, MAYA_TYPE_MAP.
Signal dataclass (ticker, signal_type, score, metadata, source, timestamp). State load/save functions. refresh_company_cache() — fetches Maya autocomplete API.
Main loop: run_research_cycle() orchestrates all 3 phases. Starts Telegram bot daemon. Reads BotSettings every cycle (so /set_interval takes effect without restart). Handles graceful shutdown.

h3: Phase 1 — Data Collection (Sequential, once per cycle)
p: Uses a single shared Playwright browser session. Required because Maya's API is protected by Incapsula WAF which blocks all plain HTTP clients.

tr.td: Maya company cache — POST to Maya autocomplete API
~500 {companyId, name_hebrew} entries. Used for Hebrew name-to-ID matching in news articles.
Signals: maya_ipo, maya_earnings, maya_contract, maya_institutional, maya_buyback, maya_dividend, maya_ma, maya_management. Ticker = TASE{id} pseudo-ticker.
No cache — fetched fresh every cycle
Institutional filing text — fetch full HTML of top 2 filings
Enriched signals with deal_size, stake_pct, direction extracted by LLM
Max 2 per cycle to avoid rate limiting
earnings_calendar signals with event_date and days-to-earnings (dte)
Dual-listed US overnight — yfinance for 13 stocks
dual_listed_move signals for moves ≥ 2%. Carries real .TA ticker. Most reliable leading indicator.
Israeli RSS feeds — 8 feeds (Globes × 2, Calcalist, Ynet × 2, Walla × 2, Maariv)
Typed signals where name matches; GENERAL signals where matching fails (~40% of articles)
Global headlines — 3 feeds (Yahoo Finance, MarketWatch, WSJ)
Plain text string injected into every LLM call as "global_context". No signals generated.
Formatted string: TA-125 price/chg%, S&P 500, Nasdaq, USD/ILS, VIX, WTI oil, US 10Y yield. Injected into every LLM call.
No cache — live prices each cycle
Sector rotation — yfinance for 2–3 tickers per sector
Per-sector label: BULL+ / BULL / NEUTRAL / BEAR / BEAR-. Based on 1-month return and avg RSI-14.

p: All 7 agents run simultaneously in a ThreadPoolExecutor with 4 workers. Each agent follows the same 9-step flow defined in agents/base.py:

tr.td: Take only Phase 1 signals whose ticker belongs to this agent's ticker list.
Runs 8 detectors on every ticker in the sector. Returns real .TA signals. See detector table below.
Each agent fetches its own macro peers (e.g. EnergyAgent checks WTI and Brent; BanksAgent checks KBE and XLF). Returns sector-level signals if peers moved significantly.
ConvergenceEngine scores all collected signals by ticker. Tickers with final_score = 0 are dropped silently.
Top 5 candidates by preliminary score are searched on Google News RSS. LLM reads articles and extracts structured signals. relevance < 4 discarded; relevance 4–10 → Signal with score = relevance × 4.
ConvergenceEngine re-runs with web news signals added. A contract mention in a news article can significantly boost a ticker's score.
Fetches fundamental + technical data for top 8 by score: RSI-14, MA-20, MA-50, % from 52w high, market cap, revenue growth %, avg volume.

GPT-4o-mini receives: all scored tickers, macro snapshot, sector rotation, deep data, and stock memory context. Returns a ranked portfolio with tier (buy / watch / monitor), 0–100 score, rationale, and key_catalyst per stock.
New 52-week high AND today's volume > 20-day avg
MA-20 crosses above MA-50 (golden cross) in last 3 days
RSI-14 < 32 AND volume is rising (accumulation pattern)
Price within 5% of 52-week low AND volume rising
4+ consecutive up-days with increasing volume each day
Stock outperforming TA-125 by ≥ 5% over the past 20 days

p: ResearchManager._arbitrate() acts as a CIO reviewing all sector agent outputs. The manager LLM prompt enforces these portfolio construction rules:

ul.li: No 2 picks from the same sector unless score > 90.
Prioritize the sector with the strongest macro tailwind this week.
At least one mid/small-cap in the final selection.
Best pick must have: hard catalyst + confirming technicals + macro alignment.
Avoid repeating last week's Stock of the Week pick (stored in last_weekly_pick in state).

p: The ConvergenceEngine is the mathematical heart of the system. It converts a list of raw signals into a final ranked score per ticker.

tr.td: New listing — maximum information asymmetry window before price discovery
Concrete, revenue-generating event with a counterparty and value
FDA/EMA/CE mark approval unlocks an entire product market
Smart money taking a position — informed signal with skin in the game
New 52w high with volume — price action confirming a fundamental thesis
Overnight US move = leading indicator for TASE open next morning
Earnings beat / guidance raise = fundamental surprise
IPO confirmed in financial press before Maya filing appears
Something is happening — price reacts before news is published
Informed accumulation / distribution — one of the earliest signals
Accumulation pattern: sellers exhausted, buyers stepping in
Capitulation followed by buying — a classic reversal setup
4+ up days with building volume = sustained institutional buying
Outperforming TA-125 by 5%+ over 20 days = sector rotation in progress

p: When two or more signal types confirm each other on the same ticker, the final score is multiplied. Only the highest applicable multiplier is used.

tr.td: Someone is buying ahead of an expected earnings event — strong informed-trading signal
Stock at multi-month lows, reversal beginning, earnings approaching — classic catalyst setup
Deeply oversold stock starting to accumulate before earnings — high risk/reward
Earnings news AND unusual volume — confirms the market is reacting
Stock already outperforming, catalyst approaching — momentum + event = highest conviction
Contract filing + volume reaction = material deal already being priced in
Institutional filing + price action = confirmed smart money entry

h2: LLM Intelligence — What the AI Knows
p: Every GPT prompt in the system contains an explicit Israeli-market knowledge framework that generic LLMs do not have out of the box. This is injected as a system prompt in every sector call and manager call.

tr.td: Security escalation (war, rocket fire, IDF operation)
Boost defense (Elbit, Rafael-adjacent), discount tourism (Fattal), retail, consumer. Discount shekel-denominated domestic revenue.
Reverse above. Tourism, real estate, consumer re-rating upward.
BoI rate cut (proxied via US10Y falling)
Banks/insurance discount on NIM compression. Real estate and construction re-rate upward (lower financing costs). REITs benefit.
Banks benefit from NIM expansion. Real estate under pressure.
Exporters benefit: tech (NICE, NVMI), defense (Elbit), pharma (Teva), chemicals (ICL). Importers hurt: retail (Shufersal), food (Strauss), electronics distribution (Elco).
Energy producers up: Delek, OPC, NewMed, Navitas. Consumers/airlines/logistics hurt. Refineries (Bazan) have mixed impact.
Defense export risk — Elbit relies on US export licenses. Flag as risk, not necessarily sell.
Domestic sector discount: real estate, retail, construction. Export-oriented tech less affected.

ul.li: TASE micro-caps (<100K shares/day avg volume) are valid signals, not noise. A 3× volume spike on a 50K/day stock is as meaningful as on a liquid large-cap.
For avg_volume < 300K/day: require a hard catalyst (Maya filing, web news contract, earnings) before scoring > 65.
Market-cap catalyst materiality: deal_size > 10% of market cap = transformative; deal_size < 1% = immaterial. This is explicitly in the LLM prompt.
IPO stocks (TASE pseudo-tickers): score on maya_ipo signal + web news. No technicals penalty for missing yfinance data.

h3: Analyst Memory — What the LLM Remembers
p: Each sector LLM call injects per-stock memory context AND writes back a structured memory update. This creates a feedback loop: the LLM becomes a better analyst of each stock over time.

tr.td: "Volume spike 3x on no news for 3rd consecutive week — possible informed accumulation"
Previous day's notes — allows trend detection across sessions
"Management buyback accelerating — typically precedes re-rating in Israeli market"
"Ceasefire would eliminate defense premium; thesis invalidated below 850 support"
"Q2 earnings (June 12). Price target 920. Watch for insider Form 5 filing."
Volume spike threshold (multiplier of 20-day average). Range: 1.5–10.0.
Price move threshold (absolute % daily change). Range: 1.0–20.0.
All bot reply text switches to English or Hebrew.
Limit which sector agents run. Valid: Banks, TechDefense, Energy, PharmaBiotech, RealEstate, TelecomConsumer, Discovery.
Allow quick-alert Telegram messages after each cycle.
Suppress quick-alert messages (weekly report still sends).
Current settings (interval, language, top_n, sectors) + last scan time + alerted tickers today.
Live: TA-125, S&P 500, Nasdaq, USD/ILS, VIX, WTI oil, US 10Y yield. Fetched fresh from yfinance.
Upcoming earnings events from state (within 14 days), sorted by days-to-earnings.
Latest Stock of the Week + runners-up + macro context + week theme from last arbitration report.
Live sector rating (BULL+/BULL/NEUTRAL/BEAR/BEAR-) + avg RSI + 1-month return. Runs SectorAnalyzer fresh.

h3: Free-Text Q&A — Intent Types and Tool Selection

tr.td: "What do you think about Teva right now?"
"Is there anything unusual happening with ESLT today?"
"Which stocks are reporting earnings this week?"
"Is the energy sector bullish right now?"

ac:structured-macro.ac:plain-text-body:
@startuml skinparam backgroundColor #FAFAFA skinparam defaultFontName Arial skinparam defaultFontSize 11
title Persistence — How Memory Survives Restarts
rectangle "Runtime (in memory)" { [state dict
(RLock-protected)] as STATE }
rectangle "israel_researcher_state.json" { [seen_maya_report_ids
(dedup, never expires)] as IDS [seen_signal_keys
(today only)] as SIGKEYS [tase_company_cache
(24h TTL)] as CCACHE [tase_universe_cache
(24h TTL)] as UCACHE [ticker_validation_cache
(valid 30d / invalid 7d)] as VCACHE [stock_memory
(analyst notes, LLM insights)] as MEM [weekly_signals
(accumulates all week)] as WSIG [alerted_today
(resets each calendar day)] as ALERT [last_weekly_pick
(prevents consecutive repeat)] as WPICK }
rectangle "israel_researcher_memory.xlsx" { [Sheet 1: Active Stock Memory
(full stock_memory backup)] as SH1 [Sheet 2: Buy/Watch Picks
(filtered actionable view)] as SH2 [Sheet 3: Sent Alerts
(all Telegram alerts ever sent)] as SH3 }
rectangle "bot_state.json" { [BotSettings
(interval, language, top_n, etc.)] as BSET [last_offset
(Telegram dedup)] as OFFSET }
STATE --> IDS : save every cycle STATE --> MEM : save every cycle STATE --> ALERT : save every cycle SH1 --> STATE : restore stock_memory
(on startup if state was wiped) SH3 --> STATE : restore alerted_today
(on startup if state was wiped)
note bottom of SH1 Excel memory is the recovery mechanism. If state.json is deleted, the system restores its analyst knowledge from the Excel file on next startup. end note
@enduml

tr.td: Prevents the same Maya filing from generating duplicate signals across cycles
Prevents the same market anomaly from firing twice in one day
Hebrew company names from Maya autocomplete — used for news article matching
All real .TA symbols from Yahoo Finance Screener — DiscoveryAgent universe
Caches yfinance liveness checks — avoids re-validating the same tickers every cycle
{ticker: {fundamentals, analyst_notes, prior_notes, llm_sentiment, memory_note, risk_flag, watch_for}}
Per-stock analyst notebook injected into every LLM call
Prevents sending the same stock multiple times in one day. Restored from Excel Sheet 3 on restart.
Prevents the manager LLM from picking the same Stock of the Week two weeks in a row
Accumulates all signals for the weekly report — gives the LLM a full week's view
Powers /weekly bot command without re-running the LLM

ac:rich-text-body.p: The ticker_validation_cache and tase_universe_cache take many cycles to rebuild (~10 hours for full TASE validation). Deleting israel_researcher_state.json means the DiscoveryAgent runs blind for the rest of the day. The Excel memory will restore stock_memory and alerted_today, but validation caches cannot be recovered.

p: Create a file named .env in the project root (BorsaProject/). This file is gitignored and will never be committed.

ac:structured-macro.ac:plain-text-body:
# BorsaProject/.env OPENAI_API_KEY=sk-proj-your-key-here TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN=your-telegram-bot-token TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID=your-telegram-chat-id
# Optional overrides (defaults shown) # OPENAI_MODEL=gpt-4o-mini

p: The system loads this file automatically via python-dotenv when config.py is imported. No other setup needed.
h3: Step 2 — Activate virtual environment and run

ac:structured-macro.ac:plain-text-body:
# Activate venv (Windows) source venv/Scripts/activate
# Run israel_researcher (research cycle + Telegram bot daemon) python -m israel_researcher
# Other entry points python main.py # US stock analysis pipeline (BorsaProject main) python alert.py # aTyr Pharma Telegram monitor (single company) python multibiutec.py # Multi-company biotech monitor (aTyr, KALA, RAPP, Omeros, Crinetics)

p: The first run populates caches that take time to build. Expect the first few cycles to be slower and less complete:

tr.td: DiscoveryAgent has no ticker list to scan
DiscoveryAgent cannot confirm which .TA tickers are alive on yfinance
Hebrew news article matching produces only GENERAL signals
LLM has no historical context, gives less precise analysis

ac:structured-macro.ac:plain-text-body:
pip install yfinance feedparser trafilatura openai pandas openpyxl \ beautifulsoup4 playwright python-dotenv requests
playwright install chromium # required for Maya scraping

td.strong: Maya pseudo-tickers cannot converge with technical signals

tr.td: Maya API returns TASE{companyId} IDs, not real .TA symbols. There is no official Maya→YF ticker mapping.
A company with a Maya filing AND a volume spike is treated as two different tickers. Their scores do not multiply. This is the single biggest missed-alpha source in the system.
Build a scraper for Maya company profile pages to extract TASE symbol. Estimated coverage: 80%+ of filings.

td.strong: Hebrew news matching fails ~40% of articles

tr.td: Hebrew word-boundary regex fails on construct forms (e.g. "בנק הפועלים" vs "הפועלים"), abbreviations, and possessive forms.
~40% of news articles produce a GENERAL ticker and contribute nothing to convergence scoring. Significant signal loss for small-cap tickers that rarely appear in global news.
Replace regex with LLM-based Hebrew NER. GPT can handle construct forms and abbreviations reliably.

td.strong: Ticker validation is slow on first run

tr.td: Max 50 Yahoo Finance validations per cycle to avoid rate limiting.
DiscoveryAgent misses uncovered tickers until they are validated. Full coverage takes ~10 cycles (2.5 hours).
Acceptable tradeoff. Validation cache has a 30-day TTL so rebuild is rare.
Google throttles RSS scraping at scale.
Web news enrichment skipped for that cycle. Agent continues without it. Scores are lower but not incorrect.
0.3s sleep between queries reduces frequency. No API key alternative available for free.

td.strong: User alert subscriptions not wired in

tr.td: bot/user_alerts.py is partially implemented but not integrated into the main pipeline.
Users cannot currently set personal price alerts via Telegram.
Planned feature — requires checking alert conditions after each cycle before sending.
CHAT_ID is a single hardcoded value from config.
Cannot serve multiple users or teams from the same bot instance.
Requires per-user settings dict, authorization middleware, and broadcasting logic.

h2: What Still Needs to Be Built

tr.td: Scrape Maya company profile pages to build companyId → .TA symbol mapping. Would allow filing signals and technical signals to converge — the single highest-value improvement possible.
Replace regex matching with LLM-based Hebrew entity extraction. Would cut GENERAL ticker rate from ~40% to near zero, dramatically improving small-cap coverage.
Wire bot/user_alerts.py into main pipeline. Users set personal price/event triggers via Telegram. Check conditions after each cycle.
Replay historical cycles against Yahoo Finance price data. Measure signal-to-next-day-return accuracy. Empirically tune BASE_SCORES and MULTIPLIERS.
Port the US StockManagement P/E / DCF valuation pipeline to TASE stocks. Would add a fundamental valuation layer to the LLM analysis.
Per-user settings, authorization whitelist, broadcasting. Required to share the bot with more than one person.
Finish and wire in sources/chrome_news.py for sites that block RSS scraping (TheMarker, some Globes pages).
Web UI showing live scores, weekly picks, memory notebook, and signal history. Would make the system accessible to users without Telegram.

h3: Dual-Listed Stocks (leading indicators for TASE open)

tr.td: TA-35 index ticker is invalid on Yahoo Finance. Use TA-125.
Clal Insurance is CLIS.TA, not CLAL.TA
